summary: Kang Hyunwoo meets with the Emperor of the Yushin Empire to deliver a letter, successfully completing his quests and uncovering the truth about the Nine Heavens Sect. The Emperor reveals that the sect, originally created by his predecessor, has become an uncontrollable threat, prompting a new mission to destroy them. As a reward for his efforts, Hyunwoo is promoted to the rank of 'First Count' and receives a generous, mysterious gift of territory from the Emperor.
key_moments: Kang Hyunwoo confirms the identity of the Nine Heavens Sect during an audience with the Emperor.
The Emperor assigns the player a new high-grade quest to destroy the Nine Heavens Sect.
Hyunwoo receives a title promotion to 'First Count' and a surprise reward of territory.
characters_present: The Emperor of the Yushin Empire
